title: circaea lutetiana var. glaberrima
intro: Circaea lutetiana var. glaberrima, also known as the wood sorrel or wood avens, is a subspecies of the Circaea lutetiana plant, a perennial herb native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Circaea lutetiana var. glaberrima include its ability to soothe stomach ulcers, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions when used in moderation and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
